grant_title: Samuel S. Fels Fund Annual Giving
project_area: Social, racial, and economic justice in Philadelphia; movement building; policy advocacy; systems change; collective healing and joy; power-building for marginalized communities
demographic_requirements: Focus on historically excluded communities in Philadelphia
eligibility_summary: Nonprofits with 501(c)(3) status or fiscal sponsor, located in or focused on Philadelphia, engaged in social justice, movement building, and/or systems change work.
